{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Drosswater
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dross]] proposes naming the place [[Drosswater]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
